summary: 4 services tested for login requirements. 1 accessible without login (qianwen), 1 requires login (huggingface), 1 redirects to API platform (cohere), 1 accessible with existing session (m365_copilot).

qianwen.notes: tongyi.ai redirects to qianwen.com. Chat works WITHOUT login. Successfully sent 'hello' message, AI responded. Input is contenteditable DIV (not textarea). API endpoint: chat2.qianwen.com/api/v2/chat. Previously classified as LOGIN_REQUIRED but actually NOT required.

huggingface.notes: Clicking 'Start chatting' redirects to huggingface.co/login with OAuth flow. Shows username/password form. After manual login: chat interface visible with user 'jhee28', 'Ask anything' input, Omni model, MCP servers available.

cohere.notes: coral.cohere.com redirects to dashboard.cohere.com (API developer platform, NOT a consumer chat UI). Shows 'Welcome, jhee!' dashboard with Platform menu (Dashboard, Playground, Datasets, API Keys, Vaults). Has 'Try Command A' link. Coral chat product appears discontinued/merged into API platform. Auto-logged in.
cohere.reason: No standalone chat interface - API platform only

m365_copilot.notes: Chat UI fully loaded. Sidebar with chat history, input field 'Copilot에 메시지', Smart mode toggle, voice input available. User '장희' logged in with existing Microsoft session. Chat history shows previous conversations. No login wall encountered.
